## Type of change

<!-- Check all that apply. -->

- [ ] `feat` — new command(s), new category, or new UI feature
- [ ] `fix` — bug fix in UI logic or incorrect/outdated command data
- [ ] `docs` — README, CONTRIBUTING, SECURITY, or comment updates
- [ ] `chore` — dependency update, build config, or tooling change
- [ ] `style` — CSS or formatting change with no logic impact
- [ ] `refactor` — internal restructuring with no behavior change

## Changes made

<!-- List the files changed and what was done. For data changes, include the command name(s) added or edited. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run build` passes with no errors
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes with no warnings or errors
- [ ] Tested in **dark mode** and **light mode**
- [ ] Tested on both desktop and mobile viewport widths
- [ ] New command IDs follow the `"{prefix}-{n}"` convention ([see CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md#id-convention))
- [ ] New color tokens added to **both** dark and light CSS blocks in `src/index.css`
- [ ] No `export default`, no `const enum`, no inline styles introduced
- [ ] No secrets, tokens, or credentials included in any file
